assertionResults.title: Duplicate — invalid ID
assertionResults.reason: Expected redirect to /admin/categories with error flash, but UI stayed on duplicate form route and rendered inline 'Invalid category ID'.

steps.expected: Redirect to /admin/categories and show error flash

summary: Reran VAL-CAT-032. Assertion still fails: non-numeric duplicate ID does not redirect to categories grid with error flash; inline error page is shown on duplicate route instead.
